item.title: nickgoff79: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 2min That first session from Xintong reminded me a bit of Ronnie's opener in 2013 against Marcus
item.description: Nick Goff @nickgoff79 · 2min That first session from Xintong reminded me a bit of Ronnie's opener in 2013 against Marcus Campbell. Rusty (hadn't played all season whereas Xintong's is nerves), played awfully but opponent let him get out of it with a lead. Didn't have another poor session in the tournament. 135

item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 22min 2025/26 has certainly been a season to remember for Igor Thiago, scoring 21 PL goals so far.
Fancy him to add to his tally in the second half?
Check out our in-play Price Boosts.
